voicings.name: Close-position triad
voicings.doubling_rules: double root or 5th; never double 3rd in maj/min triads
voicings.spacing_rule: all three voices within an octave; voices stacked in close 3rds/4ths

voicings.name: Open-position triad (drop-2 of triad)
voicings.doubling_rules: root or 5th doubled across octave; avoid doubled 3rd
voicings.spacing_rule: drop the 2nd voice from top by an octave; preserve no interval > P12 between adjacent voices

voicings.name: Shell voicing (R-3-7 / R-7-3)
voicings.spacing_rule: interval between R and 3 (or 7) ≥ M3; thumb-line stride

voicings.name: Rootless A (3-5-7-9)
voicings.doubling_rules: no doublings; root omitted (provided by bass)
voicings.spacing_rule: no interval < m3 between bottom two voices; voices stacked in 3rds/4ths

voicings.name: Rootless B (7-9-3-5)
voicings.doubling_rules: no doublings; root omitted (provided by bass)
voicings.spacing_rule: no interval < m3 between bottom two voices; alternates rotation of A form

voicings.name: Drop-2 4-note 7th voicing
voicings.spacing_rule: drop 2nd voice from top by an octave; no interval < m3 in lower 2 voices

voicings.name: Drop-3 4-note 7th voicing
voicings.spacing_rule: drop 3rd voice from top by an octave; bottom interval ≥ P5

voicings.name: Sus / add9 open voicing
voicings.doubling_rules: double root and/or 5th; never double 4th when present
voicings.spacing_rule: P5 or P4 between bottom voices; 9th must sit ≥ M9 above root

voicings.name: Quartal stack (P4 stacks)
voicings.doubling_rules: no doublings inside the stack; 3rd may be omitted
voicings.spacing_rule: two or three stacked perfect 4ths; tritone-quartal allowed for dom7sus

voicings.name: Power chord (R-5 / R-5-R)
voicings.spacing_rule: P5 between voices; optional octave-up doubled root
